pkgdown/index.md’s logo (added docs-site redesign’s Phase 4) line # erifunctions heading, inline like README.md’s identical-looking tag. meant two real bugs, one: (1) pkgdown’s main img { max-width: 100%; height: auto } rule overrode HTML height="120" attribute, rendering logo full width main content column — first-pass fix tried overriding inline style=, worked papered real problem; (2) review pass building actual page locally (pkgdown:::build_home()) found manual rendered alongside, instead , pkgdown’s auto-injected logo — pkgdown de-duplicates manual logo sits inside

(# pkg idiom README.md already used correctly), tag sibling paragraph , logos survived floated right. Fixed properly matching README.md’s exact working idiom (# erifunctions one line) instead separate inline-style workaround — pkgdown’s de-dupe already-correct .template-home img.logo { width: 120px } rule now handle sizing entirely, mechanism already working correctly every pkgdown-templated package.

what: eri_guide() remembers where you were, jumps straight to a task, and a documentation audit (docs site redesign, phase 7)
title: erifunctions 0.9.26
text: eri_guide() gained task_id argument: eri_guide("check_cmr") jumps straight task’s detail screen, skipping category/task menus — deep link anyone already knows ’re looking (script, colleague’s note, future epilogue hint). Unknown ids abort clear message pointing eri_task_map(). eri_guide() now remembers last category visited session offers “Continue …” top menu next time, instead always starting top. Uses getOption()/options() session-state convention eri_verbosity() (R/console.R), new package-environment pattern — resets fresh R session. registry accuracy sweep found two real bugs existing tests couldn’t catch: call: templates parse R can still silently omit required argument. start_project’s eri_research_init(project_name) dropped 3 required arguments (country, disease, description); population_totals’s eri_spatial_pop(boundaries) used parameter name (boundaries) doesn’t exist real function (shapefile). fixed, test-task-map.R gained permanent check: every call: template must represent every required argument referenced function, just parse valid R. roxygen title/@family audit (via roxygen2::parse_package(), eyeballing): checked 157 exported functions’ titles sentence case trailing period — found exactly one real issue (erifunctions_io()’s -lowercase, fragment-style title; 4 flagged S3 print/summary methods conventionally undocumented real gap). Added @family tags 25 functions across 3 tight, already-vetted clusters (CMR pipeline, DQ schema override, ODK Central) — first pass, exhaustive 150-function sweep; _pkgdown.yml’s reference index already covers cross-function discovery browse level, @family’s marginal value “See Also” block individual function’s help page, replacement . “Preflight checks” scoped conservatively: real per-function argument collection (tasks run wizard) stays scope — leaves mix simple strings real R objects (data frame, sf shapefile) console prompt can’t safely fabricate, smart per-arg-type schema distinguish new complexity uncertain benefit. “Run now”’s existing tryCatch--report (Phase 5) treated guardrail live call failing. serious near-miss, caught fixed merge: bug test (scripted() mock closure re-created fresh inside wrapper function, always returned first response instead advancing) sent eri_guide()’s menu loop infinite “Run now” loop zero-argument task whose call get_azure_storage_connection() — real, hit live eridev Azure tenant repeatedly runaway process killed. data written (call read-auth/connection handshake), burned real API calls live infrastructure meant offline unit test. Fixed test bug (build scripted() closure , outside mock wrapper) second, related infinite-loop bug exposed different new test (mock never returned “Exit” choice top-level menu). Lesson: test drives interactive loop via mocked prompt traced every route mock can take, just intended one — offline test code accidentally reaches un-mocked live-integration function actually run .

what: Pipeline functions now hint at the next step, sourced from the task registry (docs site redesign, phase 6)
title: erifunctions 0.9.25
text: Five pipeline functions now print one-line “Next:” hint success, naming natural next task representative call: eri_spatial_reconcile() (→ join points admin units map ), eri_split_cmr() (→ review approve CMR interactively), eri_ingest() (→ triage log backlog), eri_approve_cmr() (→ triage log backlog), eri_research_init() (→ log progress manage artifacts go). Gated “full” verbosity like every narration (.eri_say_info(), eri_verbosity("quiet") silences anything else). hook new optional epilogue_after: field inst/registry/task_map.yaml, new logic scattered across five files: hooked leaf names one reference: functions unambiguous completion point, .eri_task_epilogue() (R/task_registry.R) actual lookup + printing generically leaf’s next: field. 5 ~32 tasks got hook — multi-reference leaves (e.g. “log progress manage artifacts,” covers six functions called routinely throughout study) single call means “done task,” guessing one fire hint wrong moment; deliberately left unhooked rather forced. tests/testthat/test-task-map.R gained 3 new integrity checks: every epilogue_after: value leaf’s reference: list (hook can’t name function task doesn’t even claim touch), every leaf epilogue_after: also next: point , two leaves hook function — plus 3 runtime tests exercising .eri_task_epilogue() directly (real hook fires right message, unregistered function name silent, quiet verbosity suppresses ). review pass caught nothing exercised real call sites situ — every existing test covering 5 hooked functions’ success paths, plus new .eri_task_epilogue() unit tests, nothing fail .eri_task_epilogue(...) call real call site ever deleted broken (’s wrapped tryCatch, broken lookup fails silently, loudly). Added one expect_message(..., "Next:") per hooked function test-cmr.R (×2), test-dal.R, test-research.R, test-spatial.R. Also tidied eri_spatial_reconcile()’s hook placement match four (assign, epilogue, return bare variable — nothing hook can fail) added one-line comment .eri_task_epilogue()’s [[1]] explaining single-match assumption relies .

what: eri_guide(): an interactive console wizard over the task registry (docs site redesign, phase 5)
title: erifunctions 0.9.24
text: Added eri_guide(), eri_dq_review()-style interactive menu wizard task registry (inst/registry/task_map.yaml): pick category, pick task, see call, guide, reference functions touches. Reuses R/dq_review.R’s exact .eri_prompt_menu()/utils::menu() primitives — nothing new learn, nothing persisted, safe exit rerun anytime. “run guardrail” mechanical, schema field: task’s call offered “Run now” parses genuinely zero-argument call (.eri_guide_zero_arg(), checked exact call string test-task-map.R already verifies parses R) — 4 ~32 registry tasks qualify (get_azure_storage_connection(), eri_data_model() ×2, eri_template_list()). Everything else needs real argument values wizard safe way fabricate, can shown, guide opened (utils::vignette()) full walkthrough. Deeper argument collection (preflight checks, session memory) stays scoped Phase 7 (“wizard depth”) rather building prematurely . Added tests/testthat/test-guide.R: interactive-guard, zero-arg classifier (synthetically cross-checked every call actually bundled registry), menu loop via scripted-.eri_prompt_menu() mocking pattern test-dq_review.R already established. Cross-linked pkgdown/index.md README.md’s task-index callout, added _pkgdown.yml’s “Start ” reference group alongside eri_task_map()/eri_data_model(). review pass caught “Run now” tryCatch, unlike “Open guide” branch right next — live call fails (auth cancelled, network) dumped raw error Data Analyst mid-wizard instead returning menu; fixed. Also fixed silent case: eval()’s return value isn’t auto-printed way typing call console , genuinely visible result (e.g. get_azure_storage_connection()’s connection object) discarded confirmation connect succeeded — now printed via withVisible(), matching console behavior exactly. New tests cover failure path visible-result path.

what: A real front door: role cards + a pipeline diagram on the site homepage (docs site redesign, phase 4)
title: erifunctions 0.9.23
text: Added pkgdown/index.md, pkgdown-homepage (pkgdown checks pkgdown/index.md index.md README.md; placed inside pkgdown/, already .Rbuildignored pkgdown/extra.css/pkgdown/favicon/ earlier phases, rather package root — root-level index.md triggers R CMD check’s “Non-standard file/directory found top level” NOTE, caught review pass reading actual CI log rather trusting green check mark) built site visitor rather GitHub browser: two role cards (Data Analyst / Epidemiologist), ordered path link paced/analytics follow-; callout top new task-index article “trying ?”; Mermaid diagram raw → staged → processed pipeline eri_approve() gate. README.md’s content unchanged aside routine version-line bump — ’s still GitHub landing page fuller reference (install steps, environment variables, contributing) homepage links . Verified locally via pkgdown:::build_home() (full build_site() — home page alone doesn’t need reference/article build): confirmed role cards Mermaid diagram render, caught man/figures/logo.png needs copy_figures() run build_home() pkgdown can’t resolve path rewrites (reference/figures/logo.png) — build-order detail local verification harness, site bug (real build_site() call always runs steps). review pass also reconciled install snippet README’s (devtools::install_github(), remotes::install_github()) — work, site README meant converge, quietly diverge first thing new user copies.

what: A task registry answers “what are you trying to do?” (docs site redesign, phase 3)
title: erifunctions 0.9.22
text: Added inst/registry/task_map.yaml, tree ~31 common DA/Epi tasks grouped 8 categories (get set , bring data , check quality & approve, work backlog, use approved data, run research study, places & maps, add new program). leaf names representative call, guide walks end end (), reference functions touches — single shared source rest guidance system (task-index article now, planned eri_guide() console wizard pipeline-function “next step” epilogues later) reads , instead three copies can drift apart. Added eri_task_map(), exported console printer (“Start ”, alongside eri_data_model()) prints tree grouped category task’s call guide, returns flattened registry invisibly data frame. Added generated task-index article (“trying ?”), real executed chunk reads bundled registry renders knitr::kable() table — can’t go stale relative YAML way hand-written prose can. Added tests/testthat/test-task-map.R, integrity suite: every reference: name real exported function, every guide: slug matches real vignettes/*.Rmd file, every call: template parses valid R, every next: id resolves real task id, every leaf id unique. unverifiable claim registry now test failure, stale doc. review pass caught 7 call: templates using invented parameter names/order instead real function signature (worst case: eri_sharepoint_upload()’s first two positional arguments swapped) — integrity suite checks call parses, matches real signature, slipped past ; 7 fixed field’s comment tightened say parameter names/order must real. Also moved compare_cutover “use approved data” “bring data ” (’s pipeline-validation step, reporting output).

what: Every guide now says what it costs before you start (docs site redesign, phase 2)
title: erifunctions 0.9.21
text: Added metadata strip 25 vignettes: type (Walkthrough / Desk reference / Deep-dive), time estimate, needs (nothing / Azure / Azure + ODK), whether ’s sandbox-safe (runs built-atlantis training country, fully offline, vs. touches/illustrates real country’s namespace) — answers “can run without breaking real country” reading word. Implemented pandoc fenced div (::: {.eri-guide-meta}), styled new pkgdown/extra.css (pkgdown auto-copies links pkgdown/extra.css/extra.js). Added prev/next path footers 7 articles actually part strictly ordered role path — ~14 originally estimated. Reading package’s “order” text (getting-started.Rmd, docs/guides.md) implementing found real strict sequence connections-guide (shared first step), either 3-step DA core (onboard → ingest → logs) 3-step Epi core (research → reconcile → DQ). CMR, ODK, ad-hoc SQL, reporting, QC-feedback, survey-report guides explicitly “feeds/tasks reach needed,” forced continuations — get metadata strip, invented “step N 10.” README’s guide table gained Time / Needs / Sandbox columns, matching vignette strips. Verified full local pkgdown::build_site() — just check_pkgdown() — unlocked pointing RSTUDIO_PANDOC RStudio’s bundled Quarto Pandoc (real capability gap Phase 1, equivalent invalid-config bug caught CI). Every reference page 25 articles built clean; confirmed extra.css copied linked fenced-div classes render correctly actual rendered HTML, just source parses. Found scope : epi-analytics.Rmd’s code chunks reference undefined objects aren’t actually runnable shipped — logged nice--, fixed PR. review pass caught one strip misapplied sandbox-safe rule (da-qc-feedback-guide.Rmd’s “Notify team” aside illustrates real country’s Teams channel, ’s , yes, even though rest guide offline) wired .eri-sandbox-yes/.eri-sandbox-CSS classes defined never actually used strip — fixed.

what: Reference index reorganized around the user’s lifecycle, not the source layout (docs site redesign, phase 1)
title: erifunctions 0.9.20
text: Consolidated _pkgdown.yml’s reference index 17 module-shaped groups 15 lifecycle-shaped ones. Resolves real overlap “Data pipeline” (user-facing DQ surface), “Data quality” (check engine), “Logs & triage” (persistence layer) — three names one lifecycle user experiences single loop (bring data → check → work flags → approve) — making lifecycle group (“pipeline: raw → staged → processed”) engine explicitly subordinate (“data-quality engine — scriptable core eri_dq_review()”). Within group, functions ordered reach first (called group’s desc:) rather alphabetically — pkgdown’s subtitle: field turned whole-section heading, way sub-group entries within one group’s contents:, visual sub-grouping (attempted, reverted real CI failure caught ) isn’t part pass; caption-ordering . New “Start ” group surfaces eri_data_model(), eri_data_path(), eri_dq_review(), eri_verbosity() regardless lifecycle group ’d otherwise sit (absorbing 1-function “Console output” group). eri_data_path() eri_dq_review() also cross-listed original lifecycle groups (“Files Azure”, “pipeline”) reader browsing doesn’t come empty. Merged two pairs overlapping/degenerate groups: “Data catalog” + “Querying” → “Catalog & querying”; “SharePoint & Teams” + “Feedback” → “Collaboration: SharePoint, Teams & feedback”. Renamed “Reconciliation” → “Dataset comparison & cutover” stop colliding eri_spatial_reconcile() (different task, Spatial group, whose description now explicitly mentions ). Docs-, single-file change (_pkgdown.yml); verified lossless prior structure — 152 unique reference topics , two intentional cross-listings (eri_data_path, eri_dq_review) added. First 8-phase docs-site redesign plan second Fable design consult (following DQ workflow redesign’s), also scoped longer-term eri_dq_review()-style interactive console wizard (eri_guide()) whole package — see docs/roadmap.md.

what: Fixes found by a fresh-user test of the new DQ-review guide
title: erifunctions 0.9.19
text: Fixed real bug eri_dq_review()’s “Print report” menu item: printed eri_table() flextable console, – outside RStudio’s Viewer (plain console, VS Code terminal, SSH session) – nowhere render dumps print.flextable()’s raw diagnostic summary instead (flextable object. col_keys: ... original dataset sample: ...) rather flags. Now prints plain table, matching console-native convention .eri_dq_review_report() (main loop’s display) already followed exactly reason. Fixed formatting bug: .eri_dq_review_fix_in_source()’s “fix value” instructions used cli_alert_info() two-element bullet vector; cli_alert_info() ever renders single bullet, two lines glued together space ("...sheet.Issue: ..."). Switched cli_bullets(), renders element line. anti-pattern (cli_alert_info()/ cli_alert_danger()/cli_alert_warning() called multi-element vector) found fixed ten places across R/dq.R (schema-override lifecycle messages) R/cmr.R (force-approve, outstanding-measures, audit-trail-missing messages) – now use cli_bullets(). Tightened da-dq-review-guide.Rmd’s transcript accuracy: added disclosure real console output noisier trimmed transcripts shown (schema-fallback warnings, rename messages), explanation expected atlantis-“load schema Azure” warning, previously-missing “Open file review/edit” line, missing per-sheet subheader re-run listing, corrected “holds state ” claim (re-derives real, logged DQ check every open, doesn’t read stale cached state). cleanup section now also removes _fixed workbook copy exported HTML report, eri_dq_export() writes working directory default previously went uncleaned. Found via fresh-user (da-fresh-user agent) run whole guide live real atlantis sandbox – caught two real bugs several accuracy gaps hand-review alone missed; nothing else guide needed correction (every menu prompt, choice order, full Approve transcript matched exactly).

what: New guide: interactively triaging and handing back DQ flags (da-dq-review-guide)
title: erifunctions 0.9.18
text: New vignette da-dq-review-guide.Rmd, worked, run--live walkthrough eri_dq_review() end end – build practice CMR workbook two deliberate problems, split , run review, work flags (one via “fix source” + re-run, one via “mark noted” explanation), print handback file (eri_dq_export()), approve. Practiced entirely built-atlantis training sandbox, nothing touches real country’s data. Framed around eri_dq_review() single entry point: CMR QC/feedback guides present DQ pipeline sequence functions DA calls (scriptable core, still exist automation); guide leads interactive wrapper instead, DA never remember sequence function part . Added _pkgdown.yml’s “data analysts” articles, docs/guides.md’s guide matrix, README.md’s guide table; cross-linked da-cmr-guide.Rmd da-qc-feedback-guide.Rmd.

what: eri_dq_export(): a self-contained DQ handback file, and the QC/CMR guides converge on it (Phase 8, final phase of the DQ workflow redesign)
title: erifunctions 0.9.17
text: New eri_dq_export(flags, file, format, country, period): renders DQ flags tibble self-contained HTML (print stylesheet, browser print--PDF works cleanly – pagedown/weasyprint dependency) GitHub-flavoured Markdown file. Deliberately generalised beyond CMR case: renders richer per-measure tibble eri_cmr_dq_report() (sheet, excel_row, status, note), organised one section per sheet, plain run_dq_checks() flags tibble (column/value/issue ), rendered one flat table – whichever shape hand . file = NULL (default) writes dq-report-<country>-<period>-<date>.<ext> working directory, mirroring eri_feedback_report()’s convention. eri_dq_review()’s “Print report” menu item now calls automatically, handing -session flags tibble – including whatever status/note triage happened session – instead printing console. Closes loop whole redesign started : DA’s DQ triage now produces structured, attributable handback artifact instead ad hoc eri_table() call. New R/reports_lite.R factors shared hand-rolled HTML page shell, Carter Center org-palette CSS foundation, table-cell helpers eri_feedback_report()’s renderer new export doesn’t duplicate escaping/table/page-wrapper logic (behavior change eri_feedback_report()). eri_cmr_dq_report()’s returned tibble gains note column (NA fresh run, populated flag triaged via eri_dq_flag_resolve() report re-run), eri_dq_review()’s internal -session triage tracking now carries note text DA types flags tibble handed eri_dq_export(). Guide convergence: QC/feedback guide now ends eri_dq_export() handback artifact instead ad hoc eri_table(); CMR guide cross-links illustrative eri_cmr_dq_report() tibble example updated new note column.

what: eri_dq_review(): the interactive front door over the scriptable DQ core (Phase 7 of the DQ workflow redesign)
title: erifunctions 0.9.16
text: New eri_dq_review(country, period, plan, data_con): menu-driven, interactive session walks whole check → fix → re-check → approve loop CMR workbook. Clean -> offers approve; flagged -> work flag one time (fix value source workbook, adjust schema, mark -important/noted), re-run DQ check, force-approve (typed period-confirmation gate top scriptable core’s mandatory justification), print report, exit – one prompt. Pure orchestration, new mutations : every effect goes function already shipped Phases 2-6 (eri_cmr_dq_report(), eri_dq_flag_resolve(), eri_logs_resolve(), eri_dq_schema_edit()/eri_dq_schema_submit(), eri_split_cmr(), eri_approve_cmr()). wrapper holds state beyond one -memory, per-call path cache (local workbook ’re fixing session) – close mid-review run later, picks exactly log YAMLs say things . Interactive : refuses run non-interactively (checked via rlang::is_interactive(), seam options(rlang_interactive = TRUE) gives tests), clear pointer scriptable core scripts/CI. rstudioapi added Suggests (never Imports), guarded behind internal .eri_open_file() – opens file RStudio editor available, otherwise prints path terminals already render clickable link. live (semi-scripted) validation run atlantis sandbox caught real design bug shipped: loop originally re-ran DQ check top every iteration, marking flag -important – doesn’t touch underlying staged data – get re-flagged brand-new “open” issue next iteration, forever. Fixed tracking flags tibble -memory iterations, applying triage decisions locally, re-fetching Azure explicit “Re-run DQ check” action. Also fixes related gap found pass: eri_dq_flag_resolve() updates flag’s per-flag status, never DQ log entry’s status/handled fields eri_approve_cmr() actually checks – marking every flag -important/noted wouldn’t unblock approval. wrapper now closes entry via eri_logs_resolve() (auto-summarizing per-flag decisions) offering approve. Also fixes real bug found review: “Re-run DQ check” originally re-checked whole workbook, eri_cmr_dq_report() always writes brand-new “open” entry every measure ’s given – re-checking fixing just one measure silently discarded every measure’s -session -important/noted decisions. Fixed scoping re-check measure actually resplit, merging just fresh flags -memory tibble.

what: eri_approve_cmr() force-approve path (Phase 6 of the DQ workflow redesign)
title: erifunctions 0.9.15
text: New eri_approve_cmr(..., force = FALSE, justification = NULL): rare case outstanding measure must promoted anyway (e.g. known template quirk confirmed country, deadline). force = TRUE requires non-empty justification – interactive confirmation prompt , since scriptable core keep working unattended scripts/CI; extra human friction belongs planned interactive eri_dq_review() wrapper (Phase 7), function. Bypassed measures annotated, never silently resolved. bypassed dq_flags entry (one exists – “never DQ-checked” bypass nothing annotate) marked handled via eri_logs_resolve(..., forced = TRUE), now records forced triage block alongside note pointing back approval’s log. open backlog stays clean without ever pretending flag genuinely reviewed. approval’s log records forced, justification, exactly bypassed. eri_audit() renders forced approval bypass annotations red [FORCED] prefix, rather folding ordinary events – one part trail genuine review. New forced column every event row. Sequenced deliberately Phase 5 (eri_audit()): override born fully auditable, never . Live-validated real atlantis forced approval end--end. Also fixes real bug found phase’s validation: eri_audit()’s chronological sort used malformed date format string (missing %M) silently failed parse every timestamp, degrading sort -op (original file-read order, chronological order) error warning – caught re-running live validation, unit test written (happened insert events already-correct order, masking bug). Fixed format string rewrote test insert events order, can actually tell working sort one silently nothing. Also fixes print crash found review: print.eri_audit_trail()’s red [FORCED] row built message plain string, passed finished string cli glue template rather interpolating variable – literal { DA-typed justification (exactly kind free text phase’s design relies ) crashed entire print, just row.

what: eri_audit(): a chronological, event-level audit trail (Phase 5 of the DQ workflow redesign)
title: erifunctions 0.9.14
text: New eri_audit(country, disease, data_source, data_type, period): reconstructs single chronological timeline dataset, one row per event rather one row per log file (shape eri_logs() right – “needs attention,” newest first). Events include file staged, CMR workbook split (routing plan), DQ check run, individual flag resolved (eri_dq_flag_resolve()), whole log entry closed (eri_logs_resolve()), approval – returned oldest first (timeline reads forward), tibble cli-rendered print method. log_path stays every row power user can still drill raw YAML, nobody follow paths hand answer “happened dataset, signed .” Cashes eri_approve_cmr()’s dq_reviewed cross-reference: approval event’s detail shows exactly DQ log(s) backed , joining two halves story previously linked field human go read. Every row also carries source_hash (MD5 identity hash recorded since Phase 1’s raw retention), entry one – eri_audit() answers just “operation ran” “exact bytes behind ,” without opening raw YAML. CMR-specific entry point needed. Leaving disease/data_source/data_type unscoped already enumerates every disease/channel/measure country – CMR workbook naturally includes rblf/cmr split/approve logs every fanned-measure’s logs one call. Validated live real atlantis split → DQ-check → approve trail. New internal .eri_log_axes() factors (country/disease/data_source/data_type/period) path-parsing logic eri_logs()’s row-flattener already , readers log files resolve axes identically rather risking independent drift.

what: Feedback tickets gain context/attachments; eri_dq_schema_submit() packages a schema fix for a maintainer (Phase 4 of the DQ workflow redesign)
title: erifunctions 0.9.13
text: eri_feedback() gains optional context attachment parameters, backward-compatible (default NULL; ticket filed without byte--byte shape pre--feature ticket ). context named list (e.g. dataset axes) stored sub-block, five new formal arguments – keeps every existing caller’s call untouched lets areas scope tickets differently later without another signature change. attachment local file path, uploaded _feedback/attachments/{token}/{basename} ticket logged, failed upload never leaves ticket referencing blob isn’t actually . eri_feedback_list() gains matching context (list-column) attachment columns. New eri_dq_schema_submit(country, disease, data_source, data_type, note): packages live local schema override (eri_dq_schema_edit()) dq-area ticket. message auto-drafted, human-readable diff schema forked (added/removed aliases/allowed_values shown set diff, everything else – ranges, flags, scalars – → change), full override file attached, four ADR-0012 axes plus schema’s stem recorded context. Refuses submit stale unverifiable override (submitting diff base ’s already moved isn’t reliable diff) reports “nothing submit” rather filing empty ticket override untouched. Submitting files ticket – doesn’t apply anything. maintainer folds change updating Azure schemas/*.yaml blob directly (load_dq_schema() already prefers bundled copy), takes effect every DA within minutes, next package release.

what: DQ schema local overrides: three-tier resolution, hash-based expiry (Phase 3 of the DQ workflow redesign)
title: erifunctions 0.9.12
text: Also confirms Phase 2 (CMR re-run hygiene) already shipped validates end--end. See ADR-0018 full design rationale. load_dq_schema() now resolves three tiers: local override → Azure blob → bundled. DA can fork active schema locally, fix bad alias/range/allowed-values entry, keep using fix across sessions – surviving R restarts, different RStudio projects, machine reboots – without waiting package release Azure blob update. New lifecycle functions, offline-testable: eri_dq_schema_edit() forks resolved upstream schema per-user override directory (tools::R_user_dir("erifunctions", "data"), never working directory) writes sidecar recording forked ; eri_dq_schema_path() resolves active schema’s local file path; eri_dq_schema_status() lists overrides age active/stale state (read-– checking status never retires anything); eri_dq_schema_reset() deletes live override. override retired automatically moment upstream changes – never kept forever, never silently discarded. every load, override’s recorded base_hash compared current Azure/bundled schema; mismatch renames override aside ({stem}.retired-<timestamp>.yaml) tells DA , maintainer’s real fix isn’t shadowed DA’s stale local copy, DA isn’t left silently reverted explanation. Never silent schema actually ran. load_dq_schema() tags return schema_source ("local_override"/"azure"/"bundled") schema_hash; run_dq_checks() carries dq_result; .eri_dq_log_write() records every dq_flags log entry. DQ result produced modified schema now always distinguishable, permanent log, one produced canonical schema – load-bearing groundwork planned eri_audit() timeline (phase 5). Phase 2 (CMR re-run hygiene) confirmed shipped now validated end--end: three landmine fixes (supersede_staged / ADR-0017, eri_cmr_dq_report(supersede = TRUE), excel_row provenance) actually landed v0.9.10, design consult even commissioned. live run atlantis training sandbox (split → flag invalid district → fix → re-split supersede_staged → re-report → eri_approve_cmr()) confirmed exactly one file set gets promoted, leftover duplicate blocking log pileup; test artifacts cleaned afterward. See docs/roadmap.md’s “DQ workflow redesign” entry.

what: Raw retention and source hashing generalized to eri_ingest() (Phase 1 of the DQ workflow redesign)
title: erifunctions 0.9.11
text: first phase pilot-feedback-driven DQ workflow redesign (design consult Fable; see “DQ workflow redesign” entry Phase 3 docs/roadmap.md full 8-phase plan): every ingest now keeps exact bytes given, every downstream copy can traced back . eri_ingest() now archives source file raw/ anything else, timestamp-suffixed filename repeat ingests never collide, runs DQ stages . previously manual step DAs (da-ingest-guide.Rmd sandbox walkthrough); now automatic fast path. Every op-log along ingest/CMR path now carries source_hash (MD5 source file, used identity, security): eri_ingest(), eri_stage_cmr(), eri_split_cmr(), dq_flags entries written eri_dq_log()/eri_cmr_dq_report(). eri_cmr_last_plan() surfaces (falling back NA log entries written change). traceability groundwork planned eri_audit() timeline function (phase 5 DQ workflow redesign, confused V2 roadmap’s “Phase 3”): able walk figure final table back processed -> staged -> exact raw/ bytes DQ review approved . da-ingest-guide.Rmd updated describe new automatic raw-archival step.

what: Per-flag DQ triage for CMR: one combined report, issue-by-issue resolution, traceable to approval
title: erifunctions 0.9.10
text: New eri_cmr_dq_report(country, period): runs logs DQ checks every measure CMR workbook routed , one call, returning one tibble spanning every flag every measure (sheet, disease, data_type, log_path, flag_id, row, column, value, issue, status) instead twelve separate dq_report() printouts. New eri_dq_flag_resolve(flag_id, status, note): triages one flag time – "not_important", "fixed", "noted" – distinct eri_logs_resolve(), closes entire measure’s DQ log entry. eri_dq_log() now gives every flag stable index starts "open". eri_logs_resolve() auto-summarizes per-flag decisions: don’t pass explicit note, entry’s flags already triaged via eri_dq_flag_resolve(), closing note generated decisions (e.g. "2 fixed, 1 important") instead left blank. eri_approve_cmr() now records DQ reviews backed approval: op-log gets dq_reviewed field listing every dq_flags log entry verified clean, traceable chain “data now processed” back “’s every flag raised decided” doesn’t stop bare approval stamp. da-cmr-guide.Rmd updated workflow.

what: Three real bugs found and fixed during design review of the workflow above
title: erifunctions 0.9.10
text: design consult next phase DQ workflow surfaced three real defects shipped--week CMR pipeline (hypothetical future issues) – fixed rather shipping known-broken patching later: Fix: re-splitting corrected file duplicated staged data. eri_split_cmr() names staged parquet workbook’s filename, re-splitting “_fixed.xlsx” copy period already split left broken original’s staged file sitting alongside corrected one – eri_approve()’s period match promoted processed/. eri_split_cmr() now detects prior staged files period destination folder (matched real filename convention – name starts period, merely mentions , can’t collide unrelated file happens share six digits) reports . New supersede_staged parameter (default FALSE, package’s first destructive Azure operation opt-, automatic) actually removes set TRUE, logged supersede_staged steps. Fix: re-running DQ report piled blocking log entries. normal loop run → fix → re-run, eri_approve_cmr() correctly blocks every unresolved historical entry period, just newest – N re-runs meant N entries close hand. eri_cmr_dq_report() gains supersede = TRUE (default): fresh run auto-resolves prior open entries measure/period “superseded newer run” note. Set FALSE keep strict one-entry-per-run behavior. Fix: flagged row numbers didn’t match Excel sheet. flag’s row index post-processing data (spacer-row/missing-year drops), original workbook – “row 2” flag row 8 actual Excel file. eri_ingest_cmr() now records row’s real excel_row (data starts row 6; survives row-dropping since ’s column, position), eri_cmr_dq_report()’s combined tibble surfaces alongside row – use excel_row telling DA go fix.

what: CMR pilot follow-up: fixed a mirror-upload bug, one-call approval, and DQ-flag triage wired in
title: erifunctions 0.9.9
text: Feedback first live sdn/ssd CMR pilot session, turned fixes two new functions. Fix: mirror upload’s “HTTP 400 Bad Request” error. eri_split_cmr(..., mirror_pipeline =) reusing raw local filename verbatim Azure destination path — real CMR filenames human-titled (“…Data Report_Submitted_09-June-2026.xlsx”) can carry characters break storage REST call, broke projects-blob upload (data-blob upload, goes slugified name, unaffected). destination filename now generated ({country}_{period}_{timestamp}.{ext}, colon-free Windows/Azure-safe) instead reused — also means DA longer needs rename local file embed period. eri_split_cmr(dry_run = TRUE) now says ’s clean: plain “Dry run clean – ready run real” instead leaving infer absence warnings. ’s clean (skipped sheet, real template defect), run now also logged, ’s stable log_path attach note via eri_logs_resolve() ’ve looked fixed whatever needed . New eri_cmr_last_plan(country, period): reconstructs real eri_split_cmr() run’s routing plan persisted op-log (now records full structured table, just flat file list) — recovers plan didn’t save lost sessions, without rerunning anything. New eri_approve_cmr(country, period): one call approves every disease/measure one CMR workbook routed (eri_approve() one measure time). gates DQ status first — measure never DQ-checked period, still unresolved flags, nothing approved; get task list exactly needs attention instead. Review , close eri_logs_resolve(log_path, note = ...), re-run — re-checks scratch every time. Wires manual CMR DQ step existing eri_dq_log()/eri_logs()/eri_logs_resolve() triage system rather inventing parallel one. da-cmr-guide.Rmd rewritten workflow: new “check data quality approving” section wiring eri_dq_log() per-measure loop, approve section now leads eri_approve_cmr().

what: Sudan / South Sudan CMR pilot: LF + survey + training DQ schemas, a real ingest bug fix, and a one-step legacy mirror
title: erifunctions 0.9.8
text: Prep today’s Sudan (sdn) / South Sudan (ssd) CMR pilot, built verified via read-recon (structure/aggregate counts , records persisted shared) country’s real May 2026 (202605) submission projects blob. 12 new DQ schemas, closing gap oncho treatment one: {ssd,sdn}_lf_programmatic_{treatment,mmdp,tas}.yaml, {ssd,sdn}_oncho_programmatic_{prevalence,entomology}.yaml, one combined {ssd,sdn}_rblf_programmatic_training.yaml per country covering 6 real training sheet types (CDD, CS, MMDP surgery/patient, Field Ento, Health Workers — one schema route rblf/training combo; ingested sheet ever one six field-code prefixes present, run_dq_checks()’s first-match alias resolution handles ). 12 verified end--end real submissions: zero missing-required-column flags, real target=0 anomalies still caught. treatment/mmdp/training schemas validate annual roll-columns (scoping precedent oncho schemas); survey-type sheets (LF Surveys, RB Epi/Ento Surveys) annual roll-real template — monthly — three deliberately scoped identifier spine (year/district) rather guessing validation shape sparse, month-specific survey results. Fix: eri_ingest_cmr() longer crashes real template defect. RB-expansion CMR template’s “RB Ento Surveys” sheet two copy-paste duplicate field codes row 5 (#rb_ento_surv_otz twice; February notes column mislabeled _notes_jan), confirmed present Sudan’s South Sudan’s real files — previously hard-errored tibble::as_tibble() aborted entire eri_split_cmr() run country/period, including 10+ , otherwise-valid sheets. Columns now selected position (name) duplicate names uniquified (__1, __2, …) warning, sheet parses nothing silently dropped. data problem auto-correct — underlying template defect still needs human fix source. eri_split_cmr() gains mirror_pipeline/period: uploads raw workbook legacy contractor pipeline’s raw-drop location ({project_folder}/raw/filled_templates/{country}/{period}/) call, DA new-pilot split doesn’t also need separate manual upload still-running legacy process. period auto-parses leading YYYYMM_ filename (real observed convention) can passed explicitly. Registry gains raw_dir field (set rb-expansion, unset hsp-mal) activates pipelines define convention. Known real anomaly, yet auto-corrected: Sudan’s LF Treatment sheet present--zero target_pop many districts period, anomaly class already caught RB Treatment (PR #267) — schema’s range: [1, ...] floor catches way.

what: Fix / add: eri_split_cmr() scaffolds a starter schema on a missing-country failure
title: erifunctions 0.9.7
text: eri_split_cmr() longer leaves Data Analyst piloting new country dead end. load_cmr_schema() can’t find schema country, now also writes starter CMR schema template (one [eri_onboard_cmr()] produces) working directory aborting, points error message . pre-existing scaffold (e.g. one analyst already mid-edit ) never overwritten. eri_stage()’s roxygen doc table stale: listed hsp-mal pipeline, .eri_pipeline_registry carried second pipeline, rb-expansion (eth, nga, sdn, ssd, uga, mad, tcd), since CMR routing/DQ schema work landed. Doc-fix; behavior change (eri_stage() already worked rb-expansion — needs project_folder country_map, entry ).

what: Docs: explain why Uganda’s CMR routing has no CDD/CS/STH sheets
title: erifunctions 0.9.6
text: inst/schemas/cmr/uga.yaml gets comment explaining real-world routing question Data Analyst raised (DA expected see “CDD Training”, “CS Training”, “STH Treatment” sheets Uganda). routing already correct; confusion structural, bug. Per real pipeline’s 2026 template notes: Uganda’s CDD count now downstream aggregate (VHT Training + Local Leaders Training), CS Training dropped 2026, STH treatment part Uganda’s program (Nigeria reports ). Sudan South Sudan’s templates still carry CDD/CS sheets, easy assumption carry across countries. routing logic changed; comment-.

what: Fix / add: data-quality schemas rebuilt against the real CMR field codes
title: erifunctions 0.9.5
text: uga_oncho_programmatic_treatment.yaml rewritten. previously targeted community-level format (round, sub_county, community required) real monthly CMR . real Uganda submission returned 7 “required column missing” flags nothing else, none aliases resolved. now maps real #rbtrt_* field codes (eri_ingest_cmr() output) canonical columns, district, year, treated required rest range-checked. New: uga_sch_programmatic_treatment.yaml, ssd_oncho_programmatic_treatment.yaml, sdn_oncho_programmatic_treatment.yaml. real-field-code structure. District allowed_values real historical district lists country (public administrative units). Verified real submitted CMR (read-recon, aggregate counts ): four schemas resolve every column 0 “missing required column” errors. Confirmed two real anomalies schemas now catch automatically via target_pop range floor: Sudan’s recent submission target 0 10 districts, Uganda’s target 0 45 52 districts. Known auto-corrected: historical district lists carry near-duplicate entries (“Moyo” / “MOYO” Uganda; “Aweil West” / “Awiel West” South Sudan) non-geographic values (“Passive”, “Refugees” Uganda; “Maban Refugees” South Sudan). left allowed_values rather merged, since confirmed real duplicates versus distinct reporting categories. Note: schema’s consistency: block run automatically run_dq_checks(); requires explicit run_dq_checks(data, schema) |> add_anomaly_consistency(schema) chain. schemas rely automatic range checks instead, cover cases matter first pass (present--invalid target, --range treated count, coverage outside 0-150%).

what: Add: atlantis data-quality schema for the training sandbox
title: erifunctions 0.9.4
text: New DQ schema inst/schemas/atlantis_oncho_programmatic_treatment.yaml. Lets load_dq_schema("atlantis", "oncho", "programmatic", "treatment") run_dq_checks() run synthetic CMR training data. schema maps CMR field codes (#rbtrt_*) canonical columns via aliases, corrects district casing, flags unknown district (allowed-values) --range treated count, training can demonstrate correct--flag behaviour without real country schema. real reporting country.

what: Improve: richer bundled CMR example data
title: erifunctions 0.9.3
text: inst/extdata/cmr-example.xlsx now carries realistic spread treatment coverage (per-district treated values give ~62–99% coverage instead flat ~95%). structure, sheets, field codes, row counts unchanged — #rbtrt_treated / #schtrt_treated values differ — bundled example now tells real “district behind target” story figures CMR guide training materials. Purely demonstration data; real records.

what: Add: atlantis synthetic training sandbox for the CMR pipeline
title: erifunctions 0.9.2
text: New demo CMR schema inst/schemas/cmr/atlantis.yaml. atlantis fictional country whose CMR schema mirrors uga.yaml’s sheet routing, bundled synthetic inst/extdata/cmr-example.xlsx drives full eri_split_cmr() → eri_approve() → eri_read()/eri_catalog_query() flow without writing real country’s namespace. closes gap CMR path — unlike general pipeline, whose eri_approve() country-locked — exercised end--end real reporting country, load_cmr_schema() requires per-country schema file. Use training testing CMR pipeline; real reporting country.

what: Fix: metadata writes on ADLS Gen2, and ODK auto-connect
title: erifunctions 0.9.1
text: Concurrency-safe metadata writes now work ADLS Gen2 (dfs) endpoint. conditional write behind .eri_yaml_update() (ADR-0002) issued blob-API PUT (x-ms-blob-type: BlockBlob -Match/-None-Match) dfs endpoint — package default — rejects HTTP 400 ("HTTP header mandatory request specified"), writing nothing. Every metadata store affected: ODK registry, data catalog, artifact registry, eri_feedback(). versioned read conditional write now route account’s blob endpoint, supports operations natively — including 412 stale-ETag conflict guards optimistic-concurrency retry loop. Parquet/file writes (already used correct storage_upload path) unchanged. surfaced eri_odk_sync() erroring final last_synced update even though every Parquet already landed raw/. See ADR-0016. ODK functions auto-connect . data_con passed, .odk_data_con() built token bare Sys.getenv() reads sent empty client_id vars unset, failing AADSTS900144. now delegates get_azure_storage_connection() — zero-config connector rest package uses — auto-connect inherits interactive-auth defaults (mirrors .eri_research_con() / .eri_logs_con()).

what: Feature: eri_simulate_check() — confirm the cutover gate catches divergence
title: erifunctions 0.9.1
text: New eri_simulate_check(reference, , types, n, seed) ties Phase-3 simulation harness together: injects known anomalies clean dataset (value columns, join keys) confirms [eri_compare()] — run cutover standard — flags result equivalent. Returns detected, injected-anomaly log, comparison can see deltas caught — one-call way build confidence cutover gate catch real divergence relying .

title: erifunctions 0.9.1
text: eri_stage_cmr(period = NULL) now auto-selects recent period robust lexical max() YYYYMM directory labels, instead .max() character labels — coerced numeric (warning, integer(0) non-numeric label, future ISO/underscore period format silently selected nothing). eri_ingest_cmr() fails helpful, named error listing available sheets (alias-resolved) sheet isn’t workbook, instead opaque readxl error.

title: erifunctions 0.9.1
text: New eri_cutover_check(new, old, country, disease, data_source, period, , …) runs cutover-standard comparison (eri_compare(…, strict_schema = FALSE)) one stream’s period records outcome — stream, period, equivalent, delta counts, /tolerance used, verified actor — _cutover/cutover_log.yaml data/ blob. New eri_cutover_status(country, disease, data_source, …, n = 3) reads ledger reports streak consecutive -recent equivalent periods whether stream eligible cutover (streak ≥ n). Together make Phase-3 cutover gate (ADR-0015) runnable period--period; equivalence standard encoded can’t drift policy.

what: Feature: eri_inject_anomalies() — dirty clean data for the Phase 3 simulation
title: erifunctions 0.9.1
text: New eri_inject_anomalies(data, types, n, cols, seed) perturbs clean data frame controllable, reproducible anomalies — missing, outlier, negative, typo, duplicate, drop — parallel-run simulation actually exercises DQ pipeline eri_compare() (existing staged data largely already clean). result carries "eri_anomalies" attribute logging every injection (type, row, column, original, new) ground truth checking detection. injection counterpart add_anomaly_* detectors.

what: Feature: eri_compare() — reconcile two datasets (Phase 3 cutover validation)
title: erifunctions 0.9.1
text: New eri_compare(new, old, , ...) diffs candidate dataset reference reports differences — linchpin Phase 3 parallel run: prove eri_ingest()’s data/staged output matches legacy projects/intermediate (hsp-mal) output cutover. new/old data frames Azure blob paths (read via eri_read()). key columns () reconciles row--row — keys added/dropped exactly cells differ (numeric tolerance- NA-aware); without keys reports schema diff set-based row membership. Returns eri_comparison object (equivalent, summary, schema, rows, values) print() method.

title: erifunctions 0.9.1
text: New eri_feedback_report(file, format, since_days = 7) renders feedback backlog self-contained HTML (default) markdown file: status board, new week, closed week (ticket’s closing note), open backlog lifecycle order. Built quick standing review team stays current tickets (ADR-0014).

what: Feature: eri_feedback_status() — triage the feedback backlog
title: erifunctions 0.9.1
text: New eri_feedback_status(id, status, note = NULL) moves ticket lifecycle (submitted → planned → in_progress → fixed, declined) records audit-trail entry transition (, , , , optional note) ticket’s history. actor verified signed-identity (ADR-0003) update concurrency-safe (ADR-0002); unknown id aborts without writing status validated lifecycle. New eri_feedback_board() prints one-line-per-status count backlog (triage-meeting view) returns rows. triage half feedback log (ADR-0014); capture [eri_feedback()].

what: Feature: eri_feedback() — in-package feedback / ticket log
title: erifunctions 0.9.1
text: New eri_feedback(message, area = "general") lets DA Epi file feedback straight R — bug, rough edge, wish, general comment — durable backlog _feedback/feedback_log.yaml data/ blob. ticket records verified signed-author (ADR-0003), UTC timestamp, auto-incrementing id, area ("general" section like "odk"/"ingest"/"reporting"), status = "submitted". Writes concurrency-safe (ADR-0002), id unique even two people file . New eri_feedback_list(area, status) reads backlog tibble. Updating ticket’s status triage separate workflow built log.

what: Feature: concurrency-safe + rebuildable metadata stores (ADR-0002, Phase 2)
title: erifunctions 0.9.1
text: shared YAML metadata stores now race-safe. data catalog (_catalog/data_catalog.yaml), ODK registry (odk/registry.yaml), artifact registry (artifacts/_registry.yaml) updated full read-modify-write, two analysts editing read old version slower writer silently clobber ’s entry. Writes now go new internal .eri_yaml_update() reads blob ETag writes back conditionally (-Match update, -None-Match: * first create); 412 conflict re-reads, re-applies change fresh version, retries — entry lost. Routed: eri_catalog_register() / eri_catalog_remove(), eri_odk_register() / eri_odk_deregister() / eri_odk_purge() / sync last_synced update, eri_artifact_upload() / eri_artifact_archive(). New eri_catalog_rebuild() reconstructs catalog scanning */processed/*.parquet files data/ blob, making catalog derivable cache rather irreplaceable record: recover lost corrupted catalog, pick files written outside eri_catalog_register(). Entries derived five-axis (legacy four-axis) path; registered_by "rebuilt" row_count left NA.

title: erifunctions 0.9.1
text: Governed actions now record verified signed-identity. analyst connects interactively Azure AD account, eri_approve()’s approved_by, catalog’s registered_by, operation logs (ingest, stage, CMR, ODK register/sync/upload, DQ logs, artifacts) stamped identity auth token — new internal .eri_token_identity() extracts verified upn / preferred_username — rather self-declared ERI_ANALYST_ID. closes spoofable-approver gap approval gate real control, convention. ERI_ANALYST_ID retained fallback service-principal / non-interactive runs (carry user claim). Backward compatible — nothing changes callers without connection.

what: Docs: da-survey-report-guide — final summaries and reports from an ODK survey (#231)
title: erifunctions 0.9.1
text: New da-survey-report-guide article (DA task: create/assist final summaries/tables/reports ODK surveys) takes approved LF TAS extract summary eri_lf_tas_summary() packages reporting toolkit (eri_table(), eri_pptx_*), pointing disease helpers spatial map wrapper. Offline; real summary output captured. Completes Data-Analyst guide set.

what: Docs: da-qc-feedback-guide — quality-check an extract and give a country feedback (#229)
title: erifunctions 0.9.1
text: New da-qc-feedback-guide article (DA tasks: QC data + provide feedback countries) walks real run_dq_checks() → dq_report() run seeded DR malaria extract: auto-corrections (res$log) vs review flags (res$flags), turning flags country-feedback table eri_table() posting summary eri_notify_dq(). Runs offline plain data frame.

what: Docs: da-reporting-guide — branded tables, figures, and decks (#227)
title: erifunctions 0.9.1
text: New da-reporting-guide article walks reporting toolkit safe data: eri_table() (branded flextable), eri_brand_ggplot_theme(), eri_report_excel() (styled workbook), eri_pptx_* deck builder, pointers spatial/epi-analytics guides maps curves. Every chunk runs plain data frame (verified end--end).

what: Feature: eri_query() — serverless SQL across processed data (ADR-0004, roadmap Phase 2)
title: erifunctions 0.9.1
text: New eri_query(sql, …) runs SQL across processed parquet without database server, attaching files -process DuckDB session (Azure blob stays system record). Two composable ways put data scope: catalog-driven — pass country/disease/data_type/… looks matching processed files, stamps row provenance, unions one table (SELECT country, SUM(total_cases) data GROUP country); explicit — tables = list(name = df_or_path) register data.frames / parquet paths joins (e.g. cases ⨝ population). Returns tibble. duckdb + DBI Suggests (install ; install.packages(c("duckdb", "DBI"))) — analysts never query don’t pay . Closes ad-hoc-data-request gap (DA task 10). New da-adhoc-guide article — run--live walkthrough eri_query() (catalog roll-ups, joins, window functions) answering ad-hoc requests; -memory examples run Azure.

what: Docs: Data Analyst training bundle now lives on the documentation site (#219, #225)
title: erifunctions 0.9.1
text: reference/training materials “still learning R” analyst now pkgdown articles (one source truth site, new Quick reference & onboarding navbar group), rather loose files docs/: Orientation — big picture (data system, pipeline, task lives). Onboarding — paced Week-0 → Week-2 path checkpoints competency checklist, built existing sandbox namespaces (atlantis, uga/demo, eri_test_* ODK forms). DA cheat sheet — ~15 functions DA uses, 5-axis path, “pipeline?” decision tree. Data-model card (channel vs. measure) Troubleshooting card (errors → fixes + eri_logs triage loop). Linked README, guide index, getting-started article. (standalone connections card folded existing connections guide avoid duplication.)

what: Feature: eri_odk_upload() — bulk-create ODK submissions from a table (ADR-0013, #211)
title: erifunctions 0.9.1
text: New eri_odk_upload(data, project_id, form_id, …) — inverse download_odk_form() / eri_odk_sync(): take CSV/Excel table already-collected records (paper backfill, legacy export, download_odk_form(tables = TRUE) result) create submissions existing published ODK Central form, one POST per row. Columns map form fields name using flattening download_odk_form() emits (groups group-field; repeat groups separate "{form_id}-{repeat}" child tables linked PARENT_KEY → parent KEY, per ADR-0010), download round-trips back upload. Idempotent construction. submission’s meta/instanceID derived deterministically key_col (whole row), re-running extract re-derives ids ODK Central rejects duplicates HTTP 409 — reported skipped, never double-loaded. Validate first, report per row. dry_run = TRUE pass checks column reconciliation, required fields, type/format (dates, geopoints, numbers), — best-effort — select-value choice lists (parsed form XML; skipped external/dataset choices), POSTs nothing. real run returns per-row outcome tibble (created / skipped / failed) continues past bad row rather aborting batch. Attachments creation scope (ODK API limitation). Adds dependency xml2. See ADR-0013. mapping argument (#213) — extracts whose headers don’t already match form, pass mapping = c(input_header = "field-column", …) rename columns field names validation (e.g. paper CSV village → site_name); columns don’t list left -. da-odk-guide “Backfilling records form” section now captured live eri_test_river_prospection sandbox form (real created / 409-skipped round-trip), field↔︎column mapping now normalizes ODK Central’s root-relative /fields paths (e.g. /site_name) submissions carry data servers omit instance-root name field paths. Repeat-group upload verified end--end (#215) live form: parent + repeat children, supplied download_odk_form(tables = TRUE) named-list shape, round-trips child nested right parent. da-odk-guide backfill section gains live-captured repeat example, .odk_colmap() now excludes repeat container (type: "repeat", "structure") leaf map (latent edge; behaviour change current forms).

what: Feature: harden analyst attribution + eri_odk_purge() for sandbox cleanup (#175 polish)
title: erifunctions 0.9.1
text: Analyst identity now honest audit trail. ERI_ANALYST_ID unset, governed actions attributed "<os-user> (unverified)" (bare OS username looked like real analyst id), approval logs, catalog registered_by, eri_logs’ analyst column show attribution provisional. team CI run can require configured identity setting ERI_REQUIRE_ANALYST_ID=true, makes governed actions refuse rather fall back. -per-session warning now points options. Surfaced red-team runs. New eri_odk_purge(project_id, form_id, …) hard-deletes ODK registry entry (active already soft-deleted), unlike eri_odk_deregister() soft-deletes preserve sync history. Use tear practice/sandbox registrations don’t linger shared odk/registry.yaml; da-odk-guide cleanup now uses . Flagged fresh-DA red-team run.

what: Fix: eri_dir_delete() prunes the catalog; eri_split_cmr() summarizes skipped sheets (#175 polish)
title: erifunctions 0.9.1
text: eri_dir_delete() now removes data-catalog entries deleted path (new prune_catalog argument, default TRUE Azure deletes), deleting namespace longer leaves dangling rows eri_catalog_verify() flag. Fail-silent — catalog hiccup never blocks delete. Surfaced fresh-Epi red-team run whose sandbox teardown left phantom catalog row. eri_split_cmr() reports sheets schema routes workbook lacks single informational summary (“Skipped N sheets …”) instead deferred pile individual warnings (fresh-DA nit).

what: Data: bundled CMR schemas reconciled to the real country templates (ADR-0012, #175)
title: erifunctions 0.9.1
text: seven bundled CMR schemas (inst/schemas/cmr/{eth,nga,sdn,ssd,uga,tcd,mad}.yaml) regenerated real monthly templates’ structure (sheet names + machine-readable field codes — data values), replacing earlier simplified stand-ins. country now carries actual sheet set disease / data_type routing keys, eri_split_cmr() routes real CMR completely: e.g. uga’s 14 sheets (RB/SCH Treatment, LF MMDP, VHT/Parish/Local-Leaders/Subcounty/MMDP-surgery/MMDP-patient/ Field-Ento/Lab Training, LF Surveys, RB Epi Surveys, RB Ento Surveys); nga adds SCH/STH Treatment + Teacher/Health-Worker/Hope-Group trainings; mad LF-; French tcd/mad keep slug aliases. RB Epi Surveys → oncho/prevalence, RB Ento Surveys → oncho/entomology, LF Surveys → lf/tas, Training sheets (incl. ToT) → combined rblf/training. required_fields now lists real stable (non-monthly) identifier columns.

what: Feature: eri_odk_sync() writes to the research channel (ADR-0012, #175 phase 4)
title: erifunctions 0.9.1
text: eri_odk_sync() now lands submissions data/{country}/{disease}/research/raw/ (.../odk/raw/), recording data_source = "research" + format = "odk" operation log. ODK research channel’s collection format, data_source — retires transitional odk source token new writes (measure assigned later, analyst cleans form final dataset, path carries measure level yet). odk/cmr tokens remain registered reading legacy data removed Phase-3 cutover. da-odk-guide connections-guide updated research paths channel-level eri_approve().

what: Feature: eri_split_cmr() routes a CMR per disease and measure (ADR-0012, #175 phase 4)
title: erifunctions 0.9.1
text: New eri_split_cmr(path, country, …) reads every routable sheet CMR monthly report writes data/{country}/{disease}/programmatic/{data_type}/staged/, single Excel fans per-disease, per-measure canonical coordinates. disease comes sheet (RB Treatment → oncho, SCH Treatment → sch, LF MMDP → lf; cross-programme Training sheets route together combined rblf), per-row #…_disease field — holds programme-coverage codes (RB/RBLF/RBLFSCH) — kept column, split , treatment counts never duplicated across diseases. Data staged parsed -(machine-readable #field-code columns; reshape, automated DQ — CMR review manual); eri_approve() promotes disease/measure. dry_run = TRUE returns routing plan without writing. CMR schema gains two per-sheet keys, disease data_type, driving routing. seven registered countries (eth/nga/sdn/ssd/uga English, tcd/mad French) now carry routing keys, eri_split_cmr() works : Treatment sheets → disease’s treatment, LF MMDP → lf/mmdp, Training sheets → combined rblf/training, Surveys → rblf/survey, River Prospection / Fly Collection → oncho/entomology (Drug Inventory SBCC logistics/comms, split). deeper reconciliation bundled schema’s sheet set real template (monthly _jan…_dec columns, larger real sheet set) remains tracked follow-. da-cmr-guide now teaches upload → stage → split → approve, approving disease/measure coordinates instead one combined rblf/cmr bucket.

what: Feature: eri_ingest() stages to the five-axis measure path (ADR-0012, #175 phase 4)
title: erifunctions 0.9.1
text: eri_ingest() now writes cleaned parquet data/{country}/{disease}/{data_source}/{data_type}/staged/ (measure path, just used pick schema), operation/DQ logs land alongside. eri_ingest() → eri_approve(country, disease, data_source, period, data_type = …) now consistent five-axis round-trip. Behaviour change: default data_type = "aggregate", plain eri_ingest(path, country, disease) now stages .../{data_source}/aggregate/staged/ (.../{data_source}/staged/); pass matching data_type eri_approve(). finishes measure--path work ingest entry point foundation CMR per-disease split builds .

what: Feature: eri_approve() signposts the no-measure (four-axis) form (ADR-0012, #175 phase 4)
title: erifunctions 0.9.1
text: eri_approve() runs without data_type, dataset filed catalogued channel level measure recorded NA. legitimate channel-data (e.g. ODK), used silent — indistinguishable forgetting measure. eri_approve() now emits quiet, -per-session cli_inform first time four-axis form used, pointing data_type ADR-0012. Supplying measure silent. Surfaced fresh-DA red-team run.

what: Feature: eri_research_pull() speaks the five-axis model (ADR-0012, #175 phase 4b)
title: erifunctions 0.9.1
text: eri_research_pull() — Epi sourcing entry point — now takes data_source (channel) plus optional data_type (measure), matching coordinates [eri_catalog_query()] reports, study pulls canonical processed data tokens discovery query returns: eri_research_pull("dr", "malaria", "surveillance", "case"). Path construction delegates eri_data_path(), four-axis (channel-) form works . Back-compat: pre-ADR-0012 form channel passed data_type (data_type = "surveillance") still resolves processed path. Surfaced fresh-Epi red-team run one un-migrated step sourcing path. Note: data_source inserted data_type, path argument moves fourth fifth position — pass name (eri_research_pull(path = "spatial/...")), docs already .

what: Feature: the measure (data_type) reaches the human gate and the catalog (ADR-0012, #175 phase 4b)
title: erifunctions 0.9.1
text: eri_approve() gains optional data_type (measure) argument: eri_approve(country, disease, data_source, period, data_type = NULL, …). supplied promotes full five-axis path {country}/{disease}/{data_source}/{data_type}/staged → processed/ records measure approval log, operation log, catalog. third positional argument now named data_source (always carried channel); data_type defaults NULL, existing four-axis calls — eri_approve("dr", "malaria", "surveillance", "2024-W01") — unchanged. data catalog carries data_source column alongside data_type, eri_catalog_register() / eri_catalog_query() gain data_source argument (eri_catalog_register(... , data_source, ... , data_type = NULL); eri_catalog_query(... , data_source = NULL, data_type = NULL, ...)). Four-axis entries leave data_type NA. Legacy positional eri_catalog_register() calls passed channel data_type now pass data_source. log triage reader follows writer: eri_logs() scans four-axis channel-level …/{data_source}/logs/ five-axis measure-level …/{data_source}/{data_type}/logs/ layouts, backlog tibble gains data_source column data_type now meaning measure. eri_logs(country, disease, data_source, data_type = NULL, …) eri_dq_log(result, country, disease, data_source, data_type = NULL, …) rename old third/fourth argument data_source (always held channel) add optional measure. Positional callers passing channel third unchanged.

what: Feature: onboarding scaffolders emit the 4-part schema identity (ADR-0012, #175 phase 4a)
title: erifunctions 0.9.1
text: eri_onboard_disease() eri_onboard_country() now write schema skeletons named ADR-0012 identity {country}_{disease}_{data_source}_{data_type}.yaml data_source / data_type header fields: mda → programmatic / treatment, prevalence → research / prevalence, surveillance → surveillance / {data_type} (new eri_onboard_country(data_type = "aggregate") argument). freshly onboarded program consistent migrated bundled schemas loads via 4-arg load_dq_schema(). DA onboarding guide updated match.

what: Feature: eri_ingest() is a general, sandbox-runnable ingest core (ADR-0012, #175 phase 3a)

Signature: eri_ingest(path, country, disease, data_source = "surveillance", data_type = "aggregate", …). legacy projects-blob dual-write now opt-mirror_pipeline argument (default NULL); legacy callers pass mirror_pipeline = "hsp-mal". .eri_schema_country_map hack retired (schemas code-prefixed now). mirror bits transitional removed Phase-3 hsp-mal cutover.

what: Feature: DQ schemas keyed by (country, disease, data_source, data_type) (ADR-0012, #175 phase 2)
title: erifunctions 0.9.1
text: Bundled schemas renamed {country}_{disease}_{data_source}_{data_type}.yaml carry data_source / format fields. data_source surveillance / programmatic / research; ODK research format CMR programmatic format (channel, lane). Country codes normalised (ug → uga) disease names (rb → oncho). load_dq_schema() gains four-argument identity form load_dq_schema(country, disease, data_source, data_type) (measure optional research). legacy two-argument form — second argument held combined key like "malaria_case" "lf_tas" — still resolves via alias new name, existing callers keep working. DR HT malaria keep case aggregate surveillance schema (distinct, duplicates). Part #175 migration (ADR-0012). Deferred phase 4: eri_onboard_* scaffolders adding--program / epi-analytics / da-ingest guides still emit/teach old {country}_{disease}_{type} names; keep working via alias shim swept four-part identity rest docs/onboarding pass.

what: Feature: five-axis data addressing — data_source vs data_type (ADR-0012, #175 phase 1)
title: erifunctions 0.9.1
text: canonical path gains measure axis: data/{country}/{disease}/{data_source}/{data_type}/{layer}/. data_source channel (surveillance, programmatic, odk); data_type measure (case, aggregate, treatment, tas, …). See ADR-0012. eri_data_path() now takes (country, disease, data_source, data_type, layer, filename). legacy four-axis form eri_data_path(country, disease, data_source, layer) still resolves migration (detected fourth argument layer keyword), existing callers keep working. New eri_data_model() shows registry known data_source / data_type / format values. axes extensible: unregistered value warns rather errors, onboarding new source/measure never blocks data — first step ADR-0012 migration close #175.

what: Docs: one vocabulary for addressing data and schemas
title: erifunctions 0.9.1
text: new README section (“data addressed”) names four path axes — country / disease / data_type / layer — clarifies DQ schema key (e.g. malaria_case, passed load_dq_schema()) data_type. eri_data_path()’s error now says explicitly schema key passed data_type belongs. Phase 1 ADR-0011; bundled schema names unified one convention follow-(#175). Fixes user-facing half fresh-user red-team finding.

what: Improvement: eri_spatial_reconcile() surfaces the geocoded admin unit for review
title: erifunctions 0.9.1
