(NA matched, unresolved, outside-polygon rows.) Fixes fresh-user red-team finding (#174).

what: Improvement: a one-time warning when ERI_ANALYST_ID is unset
title: erifunctions 0.9.1
text: Governed actions (approve, ingest, ODK sync, catalog/registry writes, research operations, log resolution) stamp shared audit trail analyst’s identity. ERI_ANALYST_ID unset empty, erifunctions still falls back OS username — now warns per session know approvals logs attributed fallback rather analyst id. (Previously explicitly-empty ERI_ANALYST_ID stamped empty actor; now falls back .) Identity resolution centralised single internal helper. Fixes fresh-user red-team finding (#171).

what: Docs: flag the steps you can’t rehearse on a sandbox
title: erifunctions 0.9.1
text: ODK guide now says front creating project, uploading form, submitting practice entries happen ODK Central web interface, R. CMR guide spells throwaway-sandbox path eri_stage_cmr() / approve (require registered RB-expansion country); parsing step hands-. connections guide notes eri_list()’s name column holds full path full_names = FALSE returns just leaf filenames. Fresh-user findings (#177).

what: Fix: friendlier schema discovery and an accurate research-function reference
title: erifunctions 0.9.1
text: load_dq_schema() now lists available bundled schema keys find one asked — load_dq_schema("dr", "malaria") points dr_malaria_case instead bare “schema found.” error. README’s research-projects reference now includes eri_research_scaffold(), eri_research_status(), eri_research_tag() (previously omitted) clarifies eri_research_scaffold() (new standalone project repository, ADR-0006) vs eri_research_init() (initialise project current directory). DQ guide names disease argument load_dq_schema() examples notes schema key (e.g. malaria_case) distinct layer-path data_type. Fresh-user findings (#176). (deeper data_type-vs-schema-key vocabulary unification tracked #175.)

what: Improvement: dq_report() shows the offending values, not just counts
title: erifunctions 0.9.1
text: “Flags Requiring Review” section now prints three example offending values row numbers issue — e.g. allowed_values: 2 rows [species] (e.g. P.vivax (row 4); P.ovale (row 2)) — +N suffix , closing pointer result$flags full row-level detail. Previously printed count column, analyst open result$flags see fix. Fixes fresh-user red-team finding (#178).

what: Fix: eri_catalog_query() no longer says “Catalog is empty” for a no-match filter
title: erifunctions 0.9.1
text: filtered eri_catalog_query() matches nothing now reports “catalog entries match specified filters” — even catalog happens entries — instead old “Catalog empty.”, make filtered lookup look like wiped shared catalog. unfiltered query truly empty catalog now reads “data catalog entries yet.” Fixes fresh-user red-team finding (#173).

what: Fix: cleaner console output from eri_read() and the file-writing helpers
title: erifunctions 0.9.1
text: eri_read() longer prints readr’s column-specification block reading CSV (now reads show_col_types = FALSE / suppresses message local Azure paths), read longer erupts engine noise middle pipeline. side-effecting helpers (eri_write(), eri_upload(), eri_dir_create(), eri_delete(), eri_dir_delete()) now return invisibly, scripted / Rscript runs longer print stray NULL lines steps. fixes come fresh-user red-team (#172).

what: Docs: guides clean up with eri_dir_delete()/eri_delete(), not raw AzureStor
title: erifunctions 0.9.1
text: Every guide’s “Clean ” section now tears sandbox exported eri_dir_delete() / eri_delete() instead AzureStor::delete_storage_dir() / delete_storage_file(). keeps analyst inside erifunctions one operation likely send Azure Storage Explorer, rather dropping raw blob calls. Fixes fresh-user red-team’s top finding (#170).

what: Feature: ODK forms with repeat groups are now captured in full
title: erifunctions 0.9.1
text: ODK Central exports form repeat groups multiple tables — parent table (one row per submission) plus one child table per repeat group, linked PARENT_KEY → parent’s KEY. Previously download_odk_form() read parent CSV eri_odk_sync() wrote single Parquet, repeat data silently dropped. download_odk_form() gains tables argument. default (tables = FALSE) unchanged — returns parent table single tibble. tables = TRUE returns named list every table export (parent first, named table’s CSV). eri_odk_sync() now writes one Parquet per table {country}/{disease}/odk/raw/ — single- table forms unchanged (still exactly one Parquet); repeat forms produce {form_id}.parquet plus {form_id}-{repeat}.parquet repeat group. New bundled XLSForm inst/extdata/odk-test-form-repeat.xlsx (river-prospection form repeated larva_sample group) new “Forms repeat groups” section ODK guide (vignettes/da-odk-guide.Rmd) showing parent/child tables, PARENT_KEY join, one-Parquet-per-table sync.

what: Fix: eri_onboard_cmr() creates the canonical rblf/cmr/ directories
title: erifunctions 0.9.1
text: eri_onboard_cmr() now creates CMR Azure directories {country}/rblf/cmr/{raw,staged,processed}/ — location eri_stage_cmr() eri_approve() actually use — instead per-disease folders like {country}/{disease}/cmr/, never matched pipeline. diseases argument replaced create_dirs (logical): CMR RB-expansion programmes filed combined rblf code (RB + LF), split disease.

what: Documentation: a monthly CMR upload guide for data analysts
title: erifunctions 0.9.1
text: New article — “Uploading processing monthly country report (CMR)” (vignettes/da-cmr-guide.Rmd). Data Analyst monthly job: upload filed CMR Excel projects blob, eri_stage_cmr() staged/, parse sheet eri_ingest_cmr() (machine-readable #field-code row — language-neutral, parses English French templates alike), eri_approve() processed/. parsing step run live new bundled synthetic example report (inst/extdata/cmr-example.xlsx); Azure steps shown representative output. Completes docs/guides.md role × task matrix.

title: erifunctions 0.9.1
text: New article — “Catching anomalies new surveillance extract” (vignettes/epi-dq-guide.Rmd). run--live, offline walkthrough anomaly detectors epidemiologists: run_dq_checks(), chain add_anomaly_pct_change() (case spikes), add_anomaly_gaps() (missing reporting weeks), add_anomaly_consistency() (cross-field rules), add_anomaly_spatial() (unrecognized admin names) synthetic multi-period extract, interpret flag. Complements dq-pipeline.Rmd reference (documents schema + detector mechanics).

title: erifunctions 0.9.1
text: New article — “Reconciling free-text localities admin units” (vignettes/epi-reconcile-guide.Rmd). run--live walkthrough eri_spatial_reconcile() epidemiologists: match messy place names canonical admin units offline, geocode residual (keyless OpenStreetMap), interpret trust-guarded reconcile_status (matched / geocoded / geocoded_review / unresolved). Fills gap spatial-workflow.Rmd left — vignette never covered reconciliation.

title: erifunctions 0.9.1
text: eri_logs() – new. Reads structured operation logs (written eri_ingest(), eri_approve(), eri_stage(), eri_odk_sync(), …) new data-quality logs across {country}/{disease}/{data_type}/logs/ data/ blob, returns triage backlog tibble. Filter status ("error", "needs_review", …), operation, analyst, since; scope one dataset scan whole system. logs live Azure, backlog shared — teammate can see exactly failed pick left . eri_dq_log() – new. Persists run_dq_checks()’s $flags log backlog data-quality issues durable discoverable, just -session. eri_ingest() now calls automatically DQ checks. eri_logs_resolve() – new. Marks log entry handled (records //note triage block) drops open backlog without deleting record. New article — “Triaging error & data-quality log backlog” (vignettes/da-logs-guide.Rmd) walks workflow atlantis sandbox. Closes last open Data Analyst row docs/guides.md (previously blocked eri_logs() function gap).

what: Documentation: an onboarding guide for data analysts
title: erifunctions 0.9.1
text: New article — “Onboarding new country, disease, data type” (vignettes/da-onboard-guide.Rmd). prequel ingest ODK guides: Data Analyst stands DQ schema + raw/staged/processed folders new program data flows. Covers three scaffolding paths — eri_onboard_country() (surveillance), eri_onboard_cmr() (CMR), eri_onboard_disease() (NTD MDA + prevalence) — plus dry_run preview eri_schema_validate() (valid + broken→fixed example), atlantis sandbox. Complements existing “Adding new program” vignette (covers contributing finished schema package).

title: erifunctions 0.9.1
text: New article — “Connecting Azure, ODK Central, SharePoint, Teams” (vignettes/connections-guide.Rmd). single reference every external connection erifunctions makes: authenticate service, “confirm works” check per service, one consolidated .Renviron template, brief automation/CI (service-principal / token / webhook) callouts, troubleshooting table. role guides now point instead re-explaining auth.

what: Documentation: a worked ODK Central guide for data analysts
title: erifunctions 0.9.1
text: New article — “Working ODK Central” (vignettes/da-odk-guide.Rmd). hands-, run--live walkthrough full ODK loop Data Analyst: connect init_odk_connection(), stand practice form, monitor eri_survey_status(), manage collectors update_odk_app_user_role() / eri_odk_bulk_users(), register , eri_odk_sync() submissions governed raw → staged → approved pipeline — clean . package now ships small practice XLSForm (inst/extdata/odk-test-form.xlsx) reader uploads sandbox test project. eri_survey_status() fix. form-metadata request now sends X-Extended-Metadata: true header, total_submissions last_submission_at populated. Previously fields omitted ODK Central total_submissions always 0.

what: Documentation: a worked ingest guide for data analysts
title: erifunctions 0.9.1
text: New article — “Ingesting surveillance dataset: raw approved” (vignettes/da-ingest-guide.Rmd). copy-paste, hands-walkthrough core Data Analyst job: take dataset raw/ → staged/ → processed/ pipeline, eri_approve() human gate. reader stands make-believe country (Atlantis) private sandbox, invents small malaria line-list, authors DQ schema, runs run_dq_checks(), stages approves — handles second extract seeded errors (impossible age unknown district) learn difference auto-corrections review flags, deleting whole sandbox. Runs live laptop leaves trace. Flips matching row docs/guides.md shipped. eri_catalog_remove() – new. Deletes file’s entry data catalog (_catalog/data_catalog.yaml) path — inverse eri_catalog_register(), processed file deleted superseded. (Used new guide’s clean-step.)

what: Documentation: a worked research guide for epidemiologists
title: erifunctions 0.9.1
text: New article — “complete research workflow epidemiologists” (vignettes/epi-research-guide.Rmd). copy-paste, start--finish walkthrough whole research lifecycle — scaffold project, put version control reproducibility check, add data metadata, source , analyse, save outputs figures, tag citable version, pause resume weeks later, take updated dataset, tidy . uses public mtcars dataset (initial == 0 subset → expanded full dataset simulate new data arriving), epidemiologist can run live laptop delete every resource end. Supersedes older, partly-stale research-workflow vignette. New docs/guides.md — index task guides (one per user role × task) tracking exists still missing, seeding framework epi guide first .

what: Console output: clearer, calmer, and tunable
title: erifunctions 0.9.1
text: non-developer users stack anonymous progress bars looks like package hung. console output overhauled package-wide: One informative progress bar instead many. Multi-file transfers (e.g. eri_research_snapshot() uploading 17 files, eri_research_pull()) now show single bar names current file position (3/17), rather stack AzureStor’s anonymous |====| 100% bars. native per-transfer bar suppressed everywhere replaced cli output; kept genuinely large single file (e.g. ~100 MB LandScan raster) long download still shows life. Summary end-caps. Multi-step operations (eri_research_tag(), eri_approve(), eri_ingest()) finish tidy ✔-titled key/value summary happened. eri_verbosity() – new. Controls chatty console : "full" (default – step--step confirmations summaries) "quiet" (headline results, warnings, errors ). Set whole project via options(erifunctions.verbosity = "quiet") .Rprofile, per session eri_verbosity("quiet"), via ERIFUNCTIONS_VERBOSITY environment variable.

title: erifunctions 0.9.1
text: eri_research_scaffold(): generated reproducibility-check workflow now installs geospatial/Azure system libraries (gdal/proj/geos/udunits, curl/openssl) uses Posit Public Package Manager binaries (use-public-rspm: true). Previously renv::restore() Ubuntu runner tried build curl (sf geospatial stack) source -dev libraries present failed, check red real research project. Validated dr_irs_2026 reference repo.

title: erifunctions 0.9.1
text: eri_spatial_promote() – new: explicit gate pushing boundary cleaned research project shared canonical spatial/ store, recording promotion (, , , whether replaced existing boundary, prior version archived) research.yaml. Replacing existing canonical boundary requires overwrite = TRUE. eri_spatial_upload() now overwrite-safe: refuses clobber existing canonical boundary (shared cleaned data many users pull figures) unless overwrite = TRUE, points eri_spatial_promote() deliberate replacement. Reads canonical/cached .rds format now supported alongside shapefiles. Canonical overwrites archived. deliberate overwrite = TRUE (via either eri_spatial_upload() eri_spatial_promote()) first copies prior canonical boundary spatial/_archive/<timestamp>/, replacing shared reference data reversible (ADR-0009). eri_research_status() now also reports boundary promotions project made canonical (summarised separately inbound input table). eri_research_status() – new: manifest every input project depends (source, pulled_at, update count, whether prior version archived) plus output/snapshot/tag counts. check_remote = TRUE flags inputs whose Azure source newer local copy. eri_research_pull() now update--archival: re-pull moves prior local version data/_archive/<timestamp>/ records , dedups pulled_data (re-pull source replaces record instead appending duplicate, collapses pre-existing duplicates). eri_spatial_load(cache = TRUE) inherits . eri_spatial_pop() now caches LandScan raster project reuses rather re-downloading ~100 MB every call; records provenance run inside research project. eri_landscan_list() longer warns LandScan directory simply exist yet (returns empty tibble quietly). ADLS-safe directory creation now centralized. trailing-slash trim + missing-parent creation previously local R/research.R (.eri_ensure_azure_dir()) promoted DAL .eri_create_azure_dir(); azure_io("create") every nested-path write site (artifacts.R, catalog.R, odk_registry.R, onboarding.R, cmr.R, templates.R, research.R) now route instead calling AzureStor::create_storage_dir() directly. Robustness/ consistency fix PR #147 review.

what: Azure access: zero-config interactive auth + ADLS Gen2 fixes
title: erifunctions 0.9.1
text: get_azure_storage_connection() ships working defaults interactive (browser) auth, analysts epidemiologists configure nothing: app_id defaults Microsoft’s first-party Azure CLI public client tenant_id / resource_endpoint team’s Entra tenant eridev ADLS endpoint. remain overridable via existing ERIFUNCTIONS_* env vars; service-principal secret stays env-. One Microsoft sign-covers Azure Storage (, later, Microsoft Graph). Fixed research-project directory creation ADLS Gen2: paths trailing slash returned HTTP 400 (request URI invalid) intermediate parents created. New internal .eri_ensure_azure_dir() trims trailing slashes creates missing parent level; R/research.R directory sites use . eri_research_scaffold() normalizes trailing slash dest, partial-failure message now explains recover (finish eri_research_init() place, unlink() + re-scaffold).

what: V2 Phase 1 – dr_irs vertical slice (in progress)
title: erifunctions 0.9.1
text: eri_research_tag() – bind frozen data snapshot, analysis git commit, input provenance, output manifest immutable, citable tag Azure, recorded research.yaml. Makes tagged analysis reproducible citation, including across data updates. Tags immutable auto-create snapshot none exists. (#135) eri_spatial_load(cache = TRUE) – cache admin boundary research project record provenance (delegating eri_research_pull()), read local copy, study’s spatial inputs reproducible frozen eri_research_tag(). See ADR-0007. (#133) plus standard research scaffold via eri_research_init(). Implements ADR-0006. (#136) keyed method (e.g. method = "google") selected without API key set, eri_spatial_reconcile() now aborts front guidance store key user .Renviron (e.g. GOOGLEGEOCODE_API_KEY), rather surfacing lower-level geocoder error. (#143) Geocodes now trusted (status "geocoded", names assigned) service flag partial/low-confidence match assigned coarser admin units agree parent levels supplied. Otherwise row flagged "geocoded_review": coordinates kept inspection analyst’s names left untouched. Guards geocoders best-guess fabricated unmatched locality plausible point. (#145)
